meta.name: Oleksandr Tymoshenko
typedLines: oleksandr-tymoshenko — devops / ci-cd / fintech & blockchain infra

summary.text: DevOps and CI/CD engineer with hands-on experience in fintech, e-commerce, and blockchain infrastructure. Specialized in deploying, configuring, and maintaining high-load production environments. Proven ability to design CI/CD pipelines and monitoring systems that improve development efficiency, code quality, and infrastructure reliability. Focused on delivering scalable, fault-tolerant solutions that support business growth, operational stability, and fast product delivery.

log: Built reusable Terraform/OpenTofu IaC modules that cut new template-project setup time from a full working day down to 1–2 hours
Designed and maintain the company VPN for secure access to internal resources and servers (Tailscale + self-hosted Headscale)
Support an AWS account spanning 20+ projects
Designed modern infrastructure for new projects: ECS on EC2 with service and instance autoscaling, inter-service communication via AWS Cloud Map
Migrated backend microservices from Fargate to ECS on EC2 for cost optimization, and frontend microservices from Fargate to Cloudflare + S3
Set up PostgreSQL data replication with Debezium and self-hosted GitHub Actions runners for CI
Operated and optimized high-load blockchain RPC nodes (Solana RPC, OP stack, Cosmos-like)
Reduced RPC cluster costs by 65% through infrastructure optimization, traffic distribution, and proper resource sizing while maintaining high availability
Administered the AWS account of a large enterprise project (20+ services), maintaining high availability, security, and cost optimization
Migrated part of the project from Heroku to AWS; redesigned infrastructure and optimized database configuration for a 40% cost reduction
Optimized CI/CD pipelines: 10–50% reduction in execution time, 40% decrease in failure rate
Increased deployment frequency from 1–2/week to 3–5/day by letting developers update variables directly through CircleCI, removing manual Terraform dependency
Drove company-wide DevOps integration and culture, improving collaboration and accelerating delivery times
Evaluated, selected, and deployed AI tooling at the company level to enhance automation and decision-making

hard: CI/CD: Jenkins, CircleCI, GitLab CI, GitHub CI
Monitoring: Zabbix, CloudWatch, Prometheus & Grafana, EFK stack, NewRelic
Blockchain RPC nodes: Solana, OP stack, Cosmos-like
App stacks: Django, Node.js, Ruby on Rails, Magento 2
ML model deployment, OpenAI API integration
soft: Effective communication with technical and non-technical stakeholders

footer.builtWith: Built with Terraform, S3 + CloudFront, and zero backend.
